metadata.description: Marketplace for travel planning and guide redesign plugins.

plugins.name: jhins-trip-planner
plugins.description: End-to-end trip planner: pre-trip prep, round-trip transport, hotels, day-by-day itineraries with weather and buffer times, route-fit dining, local specialties, categorized budget, and source-traceable recommendations. Three modes: planning advice, guide redesign, or page refactor.
